title: DevOps Integration | VF-UK | Apr 2019 - Mar 2020
summary: Project Management for implementation of DevOps tooling resulting in a 50% reduction in delivery errors, 3.5 FTE savings, and improved customer satisfaction.
details: The project was aimed at moving away from the incumbent manual process by adapting new tools and methodology for code management, testing , deployment and documentation. The project was aimed to improve overall delivery timelines and enhancing customer satisfaction by reducing delivery errors to higher environment by 50%

Managed E2E implementation of DevOps tools (GIT, Ansible , Jenkins) from Dev to Production environment by working closely with all the stakeholders, providing timelines updates and projections and ensuring closure as per agreed timelines.
This implementation resulted in 3.5 FTE savings and enhanced working experience for the technical teams adding further to good quality and timely delivery

title: Kanban Board Setup | VF-UK | Jan 2019 - Mar 2019
summary: Transitioned team to new ways of working, optimizing JIRA usage and migrating data to Azure DevOps. This resulted in 2 FTE savings and improved customer satisfaction.
details: The transition was aimed at breaking down silos of delivery management and making data available to the entire team to ensure ownership and accountability of individual tasks
Solution design for status workflows and fields in JIRA (and later in Azure DevOps) to capture all relevant information
Setting up project plan to transition entire team to the new ways of working
Training development team for optimized usage of JIRA
Personally migrated all data from JIRA to Azure DevOps ensuring continuity of service and integrity of KPIs
JIRA implementation resulted in 2 FTE savings for the organization and improved customer satisfaction

title: Service Transition Service | VF-UK | May 2018 - Oct 2018
summary: Project management for service transition from incumbent vendor to VOIS for 50+ FTE. Coordinating with Vodafone UK to ensure a smooth transition.
details: Project management for transition of service from incumbent vendor to _VOIS for 50+ FTE
Coordinating discussions with vendors to align key resources for the transition process.
Ensuring that all information is included in the reviews of Vodafone UK’s transition plan.
Monitoring the closure of transitions in accordance with the established timelines
